dashboard.tsconfig.json:
{
  "compilerOptions": {
    "target": "ES2022",
    "useDefineForClassFields": true,
    "lib": ["DOM", "DOM.Iterable", "ES2022"],
    "module": "ESNext",
    "skipLibCheck": true,
    "strict": true,
    "moduleResolution": "bundler",
    "allowImportingTsExtensions": true,
    "resolveJsonModule": true,
    "isolatedModules": true,
    "noEmit": true,
    "jsx": "react-jsx"
  },
  "include": ["src"]
}

routes.ExecutiveDashboard.tsx: export default function ExecutiveDashboard() { return null; }
routes.Recommendations.tsx: export default function Recommendations() { return null; }
routes.RecommendationDetail.tsx: export default function RecommendationDetail() { return null; }
